properties.body: NAVAREA XX 93/26 BARENTS SEA AND CHYOSHSKAYA GUBA. CHART RUS 10100. 1. MISSILE FIRINGS 0400 TO 1700 UTC DAILY 29 JUN TO 01 JUL NAVIGATION PROHIBITED IN TERRITORIAL WATERS DANGEROUS OUTSIDE IN AREA BOUNDED BY: 68-38.0N 046-32.0E, 68-24.0N 048-03.0E, 67-49.0N 048-56.0E, THEN COASTAL LINE TO 67-19.0N 044-54.0E, 67-34.3N 045-13.0E, THEN COASTAL LINE TO 68-22.0N 046-12.0E. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 011800 UTC JUL 26. NNNN
